extract_git_diffs: extract git diffs from a repository and save commit metadata to a CSV file
run_git_diff_extractor_cli: run the git diff extractor CLI tool to extract diffs from a git repository
extract_commit_data: extract commit metadata and diffs from a git repository into a list of dictionaries
create_dataframe_from_commits: create a pandas DataFrame from a list of commit data dictionaries
get_git_repo: initialize and return a git repository object from a given repository path
